title: Sulr'mares
description: A rather spooky pack of dino's, creepy mods, and a lot of mods to make your experience even rougher.
body:
# Welcome to Sulr'mares!
This modpack is built specifically to be spooky and hardcore.
It's not perfect and it's not completely tried and tested to the fullest. If you are willing to endure the pain and complete this nightmare let me know how you feel about it.
If this picks up any traction I might put some further work into it.
Along with all the typical horror mods it's packed with seasons, temperature, tons of new deadly and peaceful mobs, different terrain generation for all dimentions, tons of new structures, a lot of mods to make the game feel as realistic as possible, and lastly start from flint and use Tetra to fight your way to the end.

Not compatible with other platforms versions.


### HIGHLY RECOMMEND:

**After loading up the modpack make sure to enable the below for the intended experience of this modpack.
Enable resourcepacks "Fast Better Grass" and "Better Leaves" and also enable shaderpack "Body Camera Shader"**


But what does it specifically have?

Spooky:
Cave Dweller, Born in Chaos, From The Fog, The Knocker, The Dawn Era, etc

World:
Lootr, All of Moogs mods, Terralith, Incendium, Serene Seasons, The Outer End, Tough as Nails, Snow! Real Magic!, Dynamic Trees, Alex's Mobs, Naturalist, Villages & Pillages, Etc

Realism:
Ambient Sounds, Better Combat, Corpse, Tetra, Eating Animation, Enhanced Visuals, Exposure, Falling Leaves, First Person Model, HT TreeChop, Nyf's Spiders, Shaders, Sound Physics Remastered, Visuality, Traveler's Backpack, etc

Here we are. The photos.
![Terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d18bc89a82e609eb5eaf0bc6a2798be918b2a4.png)
![Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4df0f7f7857208c0ac1a0e9a5916fc477a56c1c4.png)
